name: @peerbit/network-rust
description: Native wire codec and batched signature verification for the Peerbit direct-stream envelope

scripts.clean: aegir clean && shx rm -rf ./wasm && cargo clean
scripts.build: aegir build --no-bundle && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir dist/wasm --out-name peerbit_wire && shx rm -rf ./dist/wasm/.gitignore ./dist/wasm/package.json && shx rm -rf ./wasm && shx cp -r ./dist/wasm ./wasm
scripts.test: cargo test && npm run build && aegir test -t node
scripts.test:stream-rust-core: npm run build && PEERBIT_STREAM_RUST_CORE=1 aegir test -t node

author: dao.xyz
